Graham Stuart MP

Street Surgeries

  • Tweet

What’s a Street Surgery?

My Street Surgeries take place outdoors in towns and villages across Beverley and Holderness on Saturday mornings. They provide an informal opportunity for you to meet me and share a problem, and also to ask about the work I am doing on your behalf. You don’t need to make an appointment and our conversation will be private if necessary.

Street Surgery times (unless stated otherwise):

Beverley: 10am – noon

Hedon and Withernsea: 10.30am – noon

Walkington, Bilton, Aldbrough, Keyingham, Cherry Burton and Woodmansey: 11am - noon


Street Surgery dates:

Saturday 9th May - Outside Aldi, Withernsea 

Saturday 13th June - Aldbrough

Saturday 27th June - Keyingham

Saturday 4th July - Toll Gavel, Beverley

Saturday 5th September - Outside Aldi, Withernsea

Saturday 19th September - Market Place, Hedon

Saturday 17th October - Cherry Burton 

Saturday 31st October - Woodmansey

Saturday 14th November - Market Place, Hedon

Saturday 28th November - Outside Aldi, Withernsea 

Saturday 12th December - Toll Gavel, Beverley
